entry.title: Battery Material Recycling: Fraunhofer ISE Joins Major European Project - Fraunhofer ISE
entry.summary: Fraunhofer ISE is contributing its expertise in the field of direct lithium extraction from geothermal brines to the new M-BAT project.

entry.title: 3D-printed thermal energy storage: Fraunhofer ISE launches new project for the heat transition - Fraunhofer ISE
entry.summary: Fraunhofer ISE is conducting research into the use of 3D printing technology to manufacture thermal energy storage systems from ultra-high-performance concrete.

entry.title: Team ESILIB: Award for Sustainable Batteries with Increased Storage Capacity - Fraunhofer ISE
entry.summary: The research team is developing anode materials for next-generation lithium-ion batteries, focusing on a silicon-carbon composite that is sustainable and can increase the range of electric vehicles by up to 40 percent.

entry.title: Efficient Production of Solar Hydrogen Through Direct Coupling of Concentrating Solar Cells and Electrolyzer - Fraunhofer ISE
entry.summary: Scientists at the Fraunhofer Institute for Solar Energy Systems ISE have developed a combined photovoltaic/electrolysis module that efficiently produces hydrogen directly from solar energy.

entry.title: Silver Consumption in TOPCon Solar Cells Reduced by Factor 10 - Fraunhofer ISE
entry.summary: Scientists at the Fraunhofer Institute for Solar Energy Systems ISE have succeeded in reducing the silver consumption of TOPCon solar cells to 1.1 milligrams per watt peak.

entry.title: World's most efficient solar module: Shingle Matrix technology meets space solar cells - Fraunhofer ISE
entry.summary: Scientists at the Fraunhofer Institute for Solar Energy Systems ISE succeeded in breaking their own module record through an optimized, novel interconnection of the solar cells.

entry.title: Fraunhofer ISE Study: Negative Emission Technologies Crucial for Climate Neutrality by 2045 - Fraunhofer ISE
entry.summary: A new study by the Fraunhofer Institute for Solar Energy Systems ISE analyzes the role of NETs in achieving climate goals. Key factors include a broad mix of different NET technologies, as well as an integrated strategy for the energy system, the ramp-up of NETs, and sustainable biomass use.

entry.title: Electric Truck Fleets: Fraunhofer ISE Recommends a Cost-Optimized Combination of PV, Storage, and Energy Management - Fraunhofer ISE
entry.summary: According to a Fraunhofer ISE study, combining a photovoltaic system, battery storage, and energy management ensures a reliable power supply and represents the most cost-effective solution for logistics centers.

entry.title: Photovoltaics Equipment: Global Market Entering a Phase of Unprecedented Growth - Fraunhofer ISE
entry.summary: ISC Konstanz and the Fraunhofer Institute for Solar Energy Systems ISE have conducted an analysis of the market situation for PV manufacturing equipment on behalf of the VDMA.

entry.title: Interlaboratory comparison demonstrates highest precision in PV Module power measurements - Fraunhofer ISE
entry.summary: A recent comparison of measurement results between CalLab PV Modules of Fraunhofer ISE and the Physikalisch-Technische Bundesanstalt (PTB) reveals that the two organizations deviate by less than 0.15 percent on average from the reference value when measuring the power of photovoltaic modules.
